name: Joyce's Indonesian Fried Rice
recipeIngredient: 6 ounces Med shrimp, 41-to-50 per lb, shelled and deveined
recipeInstructions:
1. Cover tamarind pulp with 1/2 cup boiling water. Mash the fibers and seeds with the back of a fork. Strain and reserve 1/3 cup tamarind water.
2. Process shallots, garlic, chiles, shrimp paste, turmeric, and salt in a food processor or mortar until smooth.
3. Heat oil in a wok or skillet. Add spice paste and gently brown.
4. Reduce heat to high and add shrimp; stir-fry until bright orange, about 30 seconds. Remove and set aside.
5. Add bell peppers, peas, and cabbage; stir-fry until vegetables are cooked but still crisp, about 1.5 minutes.
6. Add rice; stir-fry together, breaking up the lumps of rice.
7. When rice grains are separated, add tamarind water, ketjap manis, light soy sauce, green onions, chicken, barbecue pork, and reserved shrimp. Mix well.
8. Check seasoning and transfer to a serving plate. Garnish with thinly sliced coriander and arrange cucumbers around the edge.
